title: Nursery Rhyme. XI. Historical
content:
At the siege of Belle-isle
        I was there all the while,
        All the while, all the while,
        At the siege of Belle-isle.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XI. Historical" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
